findings.claim_text: Absence of a disclosed negative market reaction is not the same as absence of cost... Anthropic's revenue and valuation kept climbing through the dispute rather than absorbing a commercial hit (run-rate ~$47B by May 2026; $65B Series H at $965B post-money) — 'the market didn't blink.'
findings.contradicting_quote: CFO Krishna Rao: government's actions could reduce 2026 revenue by multiple billions of dollars; public-sector head warned 2026 ARR of 'more than half a billion dollars' could 'disappear entirely.'

findings.claim_text: The Washington Post reported that Claude, integrated with Palantir's Maven Smart System, helped identify and prioritize roughly 1,000 targets in the first 24 hours [of Operation Epic Fury].
findings.contradicting_quote: Claude is used to help military analysts sort through intelligence and does not directly provide targeting advice, according to a person with knowledge of Anthropic's work with the Defense Department.

findings.claim_text: On February 27, 2026, the Pentagon designated Anthropic ... a 'supply chain risk,' a label whose statutory machinery had, in every documented prior use, been reserved for companies like Huawei, ZTE, and Kaspersky Lab — the first American-owned company ever so designated.
